Query is about October cherry blossoms (jūgatsu-zakura / shikizakura); response returns endangered bon-odori festivals. Need canonical_autumn_sakura cluster (e.g. Obara Shikizakura, Jugatsu-zakura).
Matsushima hub present with JR station + JR-pass flag; agent has enough to suggest Senseki Line. Could add explicit 'Sendai→Matsushima via Senseki Line, ~40 min' guidance text.
